2026-0218
2026-03-13PSPC, NCCNational Capital ActLease with Nesting Ground and Ottawa Community Housing Corporation ** NCC **Order repealing Order in Council P.C. 2021-508 and authorizing the National Capital Commission (NCC) to enter into a lease agreement with Nesting Ground and Ottawa Community Housing Corporation for a period of 99 years, for real property located at 1460 Riverside Drive, in Ottawa, Ontario.N/A
subject: Lease with Nesting Ground and Ottawa Community Housing Corporation ** NCC **
precis: Order repealing Order in Council P.C. 2021-508 and authorizing the National Capital Commission (NCC) to enter into a lease agreement with Nesting Ground and Ottawa Community Housing Corporation for a period of 99 years, for real property located at 1460 Riverside Drive, in Ottawa, Ontario.
